title: KI Store 2pcs White Ice Skating Shoes Ornaments 5-Inch Ice Skate Christmas Tree Decorations
features: Ice Skating Shoes Ornaments, feature sparkling rhinestones embellish the eyelets, adding dazzling light reflection to your holiday decor, and glittered shinny shoes blade.
3 colors available. Choose from shimmering white, soft pink, or champagne gold to complement any Christmas tree theme.
Versatile decorative hanging ornaments. Perfect for Christmas tree decor, themed winter or themed skating party favors. Lightweight and easy to hang with hanging string included.
Each ice skating shoes ornaments measures 5.5-inch high, 5-inch wide, and 2-inch in depth. Great gift for anyone who love ice skating.
Set of 2 ice skate ornaments. For DECORATIVE USE ONLY.
